nodes.name: 大分水岭
nodes.summary: 大分水岭是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联14种鸟类，包括White-throated nightjar、Powerful owl、绿宝石鹦鹉等14种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 袋鼠島
nodes.summary: 袋鼠島是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联5种鸟类，包括叢塚雉、Purple-crowned lorikeet、壯麗細尾鷯鶯等5种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 澳大利亚
nodes.summary: 澳大利亚是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联221种鸟类，包括南方鶴鴕、鵲鵝、细斑树鸭等221种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 莫宁顿半岛
nodes.summary: 莫宁顿半岛是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联2种鸟类，包括Spiny-cheeked honeyeater、Yellow wattlebird，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 塔斯馬尼亞州
nodes.summary: 塔斯馬尼亞州是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联47种鸟类，包括澳大利亚麻鸭、Brown quail、Hoary-headed grebe等47种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 灌丛
nodes.summary: 低矮木本植物占优势的陆地生境。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: Spiny-cheeked honeyeater
nodes.summary: Spiny-cheeked honeyeater（Spiny-cheeked honeyeater，学名 Acanthagenys rufogularis），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联5个分布地点节点，常见栖息地包括灌丛。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: Accessed: 18 July 2007. The spiny-cheeked honeyeater is mainly frugivorous, but will also eat nectar, blossoms, insects, reptiles, and young birds. Its habitat includes deserts, coastal scrubland, and dry woodlands. It is also found in mangroves and orchards. Its range includes most of Australia, except for Tasmania, northern tropical areas, and the southeastern coast.[http://www.arthurgrosset.com/ozbirds/spiny-cheekedhoneyeater.html Oz Birds: Spiny-cheeked Honeyeater

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: Accessed: 18 July 2007. The spiny-cheeked honeyeater is mainly frugivorous, but will also eat nectar, blossoms, insects, reptiles, and young birds. Its habitat includes deserts, coastal scrubland, and dry woodlands. It is also found in mangroves and orchards. Its range includes most of Australia, except for Tasmania, northern tropical areas, and the southeastern coast.[http://www.arthurgrosset.com/ozbirds/spiny-cheekedhoneyeater.html Oz Birds: Spiny-cheeked Honeyeater

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The spiny-cheeked honeyeater can be found in most locations throughout Australia, except east of the Great Dividing Range, Tasmania, the far south-west of Western Australia, and the northern Australian tropics. However, the birds do occur on Kangaroo Island in South Australia. Most sightings have been in sparse, woody tree environments

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The spiny-cheeked honeyeater can be found in most locations throughout Australia, except east of the Great Dividing Range, Tasmania, the far south-west of Western Australia, and the northern Australian tropics. However, the birds do occur on Kangaroo Island in South Australia. Most sightings have been in sparse, woody tree environments

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: In these areas, there are occasional small shrubs or trees (mostly Acacia species), where the birds may find refuge. Other habitats include scattered woodland, open woodlands, sparse shrubland, and closed shrubland. The birds can also be found in managed and cultivated vegetated land and pasture lands, consisting of a range of grasses, including sedges, rushes, arrow grasses, and quillworts. In coastal regions, such as the Mornington Peninsula, the birds can be found in tea tree environments along the foreshore. The birds may occasionally be found in mangroves and orchards. They are considered a nomadic species; however, this seems to be more so in the northern parts of Australia
